queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how minimal savings balances below 100 DM contribute to credit risk reduction.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating implications of a negative checking account balance on loan default probability.
